block_00: And how to keep a trading diary when everything goes wrong
block_03: Hi there! We value your time so here is a short overview of the platform news.
block_06: How to Choose a Strategy? Decide What’s Best for You—Part 1
block_07: Every trader sooner or later faces the problem of choosing a trading strategy. To make choosing a strategy or trading method easier, we decided to put together a complete guide. Learn, test, and discover new tools.
block_09: Fractal Chaos Bands Indicator: the Guardian of Order
block_10: Fractal Chaos Bands is an indicator that will help you eliminate the chaos in your traderoom. Find out how to set it up and use it effectively. Don't forget to use the demo account for training.
block_12: Why You Should Keep a Trading Journal
block_13: Just as chess players record every move made on a chessboard, so traders keep a record of every trade. To learn why a trader needs a diary and how to keep records correctly, read the article.
